title: pelargonium × umbellatum
intro: Pelargonium × umbellatum, also known as Cape Geranium or Barberton Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is native to South Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × umbellatum include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of the common cold, such as fever and sore throats, as well as its potential to reduce stress and promote a good night's sleep. Pelargonium × umbellatum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in salves and creams for topical application.
